mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, file_name, mime_type, storage_type, storage_path, storage_bucket, metadata_json from batch.file_record where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{fileId}

select count(1) filter (where created_at >= date_trunc('day', now())) as arrived_today, count(1) filter (where file_status = 'RECEIVED') as pending, count(1) filter (where file_status = 'LOADED') as processed, count(1) filter (where file_status = 'FAILED') as failed from batch.file_record where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
